utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So , um , have you told your parents ?

utterances.speaker: Duncan
utterances.text: No , but it will be OK , they are pretty cool , my brother straight so ...

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know what , I just have one more question , um , if you had figured this out sooner and um , I had been around , do you think that I would have been the one who ... ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , no . That is all right . Do not tell me , I do not think either answer would make me feel better . Here .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I do not think either answer would make me feel better .
